metadata.spearman: scipy.stats.spearmanr(cost_ranker, c_real_state) within each final pool

sign_reversal.description: negative C_real_z vs C_real_state per-pair Spearman pairs

latent_favorable.description: Track A cells D0xR1 and D1xR0

v1_favorable.description: Track A cells D3xR0 and D3xR3

ordinary.description: Complement of invisible_quadrant, sign_reversal, latent_favorable, and v1_favorable

decomposition_table.what_it_tests: End-to-end: predictor + encoder + latent cost shape
Encoder + latent cost shape after removing predictor rollout
Physical ground truth ranker on the same pool

interpretation.rationale: V3 improves over predicted-latent C_model but remains well below V1, so predictor rollout contributes while learned terminal-latent geometry remains limiting.
